 On Fri, Jan 19, 2001 at 06:10:03PM -0500, root@minime.privatelabs.com wrote:
 > 	Right now the package building and registration fails,
 > 	because of missing PLIST_SUB substitution.
 
 No.  The real problem is because I wasn't looking close enough at
 lioux's ports when I updated them to use the bsd.port.mk's automatic
 PLIST_SUB system.
 
 I will fix that now if someone else hasn't.
 
 --=20
 wca
 
 --ieNMXl1Fr3cevapt
